description: The fixed-size header of every task record. Written/read by LoadFixedDataFromBinFile. All pointer fields store runtime heap addresses that are meaningless in the binary file — their presence determines whether the corresponding variable data follows. #pragma pack(1), MSVC 32-bit.

fields.name: m_ID
fields.description: Task template ID. 0 means invalid/empty record.

fields.name: m_szName
fields.description: Task name as UTF-16LE fixed-length array. Null-terminated within the 30-char budget.

fields.name: m_bHasSign
fields.description: Whether a signature string follows in the variable section.

fields.name: m_pszSignature
fields.description: Runtime pointer (ignore value); non-null indicates signature data in variable section.

fields.name: m_ulTimeLimit
fields.description: Time limit in seconds (0 = no limit).

fields.name: m_bAbsTime
fields.description: If true, time limit is absolute (wall-clock), otherwise relative (elapsed).

fields.name: m_ulTimetable
fields.description: Number of active timetable entries (≤ MAX_TIMETABLE_SIZE=12).

fields.name: m_tmType
fields.description: Timetable type codes, one per slot (enumTaskTimeDate/Month/Week/Day).

fields.name: m_tmStart
fields.description: Runtime pointer to start-time array; variable section contains m_ulTimetable × task_tm(24) entries.

fields.name: m_tmEnd
fields.description: Runtime pointer to end-time array; variable section contains m_ulTimetable × task_tm(24) entries.

fields.name: m_lAvailFrequency
fields.description: How often the task becomes available (0 = always).

fields.name: m_bChooseOne
fields.description: Pick exactly one child task to execute.

fields.name: m_bExeChildInOrder
fields.description: Execute child tasks sequentially in order.

fields.name: m_bParentAlsoFail
fields.description: Failing this task also fails the parent.

fields.name: m_bParentAlsoSucc
fields.description: Succeeding this task also succeeds the parent.

fields.name: m_bCanRedo
fields.description: Task can be repeated after completion.

fields.name: m_bCanRedoAfterFailure
fields.description: Task can be retaken after failing.

fields.name: m_ulMaxReceiver
fields.description: Maximum simultaneous players who can hold this task (0 = unlimited).

fields.name: m_nClearReceiverType
fields.description: How the receiver list is cleared: 0=never, other=by time interval.

fields.name: m_lClearReceiverTimeInterval
fields.description: Time interval for clearing receiver list.

fields.name: m_bDelvInZone
fields.description: Task can only be delivered within a specific zone.

fields.name: m_DelvMinVert
fields.description: Minimum corner (x,y,z floats) of delivery zone bounding box.

fields.name: m_DelvMaxVert
fields.description: Maximum corner (x,y,z floats) of delivery zone bounding box.

fields.name: m_bTransTo
fields.description: Teleport player to a specific location on delivery.

fields.name: m_Phase
fields.description: Phase open/close/trigger/visual flags, 7 bytes each. struct PHASE_PROPERTY { int iPhaseID; bool bOpenClose; bool bTrigger; bool bVisual; }.

fields.name: m_MonCtrl
fields.description: Monster control array, 9 bytes each. struct MONSTER_CTRL { int lMonCtrlID; float fGetProb; bool bOpenClose; }.

fields.name: m_bRanMonCtrl
fields.description: Randomly select which monster control to apply.

fields.name: m_bAutoDeliver
fields.description: Task auto-delivers when conditions are met.

fields.name: m_bDeathTrig
fields.description: Task is triggered by player death.

fields.name: m_bMustShown
fields.description: Task must always be shown in the task list.

fields.name: m_bClearAcquired
fields.description: Clear acquired items on task end.

fields.name: m_ulSuitableLevel
fields.description: Recommended player level for this task.

fields.name: m_bKeyTask
fields.description: This is a key/main storyline task.

fields.name: m_ulDelvNPC
fields.description: NPC template ID that delivers this task.

fields.name: m_ulAwardNPC
fields.description: NPC template ID that gives the reward.

fields.name: m_bCanSeekOut
fields.description: NPC can seek out the player to give this task.

fields.name: m_fStorageWeight
fields.description: Weight added to inventory during task.

fields.name: m_bSharedByFamily
fields.description: Task is shared among family members.

fields.name: m_ulMaxFinishCount
fields.description: Maximum allowed finish count per player.

fields.name: m_FinishClearTime
fields.description: When the finish counter resets (year/month/day/hour/min/wday as int32 each).

fields.name: m_lDynFinishClearTime
fields.description: Dynamic finish-counter reset time as global variable ID.

fields.name: m_bFailAfterLogout
fields.description: Task fails if player logs out.

fields.name: m_ulLogoutFailTime
fields.description: Grace period (seconds) before logout causes failure.

fields.name: m_bAbsFail
fields.description: Task has a hard absolute fail time.

fields.name: m_tmAbsFailTime
fields.description: Absolute wall-clock time after which task auto-fails.

fields.name: m_bHidden
fields.description: Task is hidden from the task list UI.

fields.name: m_bOutZoneFail
fields.description: Task fails when player leaves a specific zone.

fields.name: m_ulOutZoneWorldID
fields.description: World ID of the zone that must not be exited.

fields.name: m_OutZoneMinVert
fields.description: Min corner of the stay-in zone.

fields.name: m_OutZoneMaxVert
fields.description: Max corner of the stay-in zone.

fields.name: m_bEnterZoneFail
fields.description: Task fails when player enters a forbidden zone.

fields.name: m_ulEnterZoneWorldID
fields.description: World ID of the forbidden zone.

fields.name: m_EnterZoneMinVert
fields.description: Min corner of the forbidden zone.

fields.name: m_EnterZoneMaxVert
fields.description: Max corner of the forbidden zone.

fields.name: m_bClearSomeIllegalStates
fields.description: Clear illegal player states on task start.

fields.name: m_lChangeKeyArr
fields.description: abase::vector<long>: runtime pointers + _cur_size at +12 = offset 497. Holds global-key IDs to change on task start.

fields.name: m_lChangeKeyValueArr
fields.description: abase::vector<long>: values for each key in m_lChangeKeyArr.

fields.name: m_bKillMonsterFail
fields.description: Killing the specified monster causes task failure.

fields.name: m_KillFailMonsters
fields.description: Monster template IDs whose death fails the task.

fields.name: m_bHaveItemFail
fields.description: Having a specific item causes task failure.

fields.name: m_HaveFailItems
fields.description: Item template IDs whose possession fails the task.

fields.name: m_bHaveItemFailNotTakeOff
fields.description: Pledge mode: item is not taken away on fail.

fields.name: m_bNotHaveItemFail
fields.description: NOT having a specific item causes task failure.

fields.name: m_NotHaveFailItems
fields.description: Item template IDs whose absence fails the task.

fields.name: m_ulCameraMove
fields.description: Camera movement ID to play on task event.

fields.name: m_ulAnimation
fields.description: Animation ID to play on task event.

fields.name: m_lVariables
fields.description: Three task-scope variable slots (global key IDs).

fields.name: m_ulTinyGameID
fields.description: ID of a mini-game to launch for this task.

fields.name: m_bClearXpCD
fields.description: Clear XP skill cooldown on task complete.

fields.name: m_ulPremise_Lev_Max
fields.description: Maximum player level prerequisite (0 = no max).

fields.name: m_bShowByLev
fields.description: Show task only if level requirement is met.

fields.name: m_PremItems
fields.description: Runtime pointer; variable section has m_ulPremItems × ITEM_WANTED(31 bytes).

fields.name: m_bShowByItems
fields.description: Show task only if item prerequisite is met.

fields.name: m_bItemNotTakeOff
fields.description: Prerequisite items are pledged, not consumed.

fields.name: m_bRandSelMonster
fields.description: Randomly select which monster to summon.

fields.name: m_MonsterSummoned
fields.description: Runtime pointer; variable section has m_ulPremMonsterSummoned × MONSTER_SUMMONED(29 bytes).

fields.name: m_ulGivenItems
fields.description: Count of items given to player on task accept.

fields.name: m_ulGivenCmnCount
fields.description: Of the given items, how many are common items.

fields.name: m_ulGivenTskCount
fields.description: Of the given items, how many are task items.

fields.name: m_GivenItems
fields.description: Runtime pointer; variable section has m_ulGivenItems × ITEM_WANTED(31 bytes).

fields.name: m_PremTitles
fields.description: Runtime pointer; variable section has m_ulPremTitleCount × uint16 title IDs.

fields.name: m_bShowByDeposit
fields.description: Show task only if deposit prerequisite is met.

fields.name: m_bShowByRepu
fields.description: Show task only if reputation prerequisite is met.

fields.name: m_ulPremise_Tasks
fields.description: Prerequisite task IDs (bit0=1 means fail condition, bit0=0 means success).

fields.name: m_bShowByPreTask
fields.description: Show task only if prerequisite tasks done.

fields.name: m_PremFinishTasks
fields.description: Task ID + required finish count pairs, 6 bytes each. struct FINISH_TASK_COUNT_INFO { uint32 task_id; uint16 count; }.

fields.name: m_ulPremGlobalTask
fields.description: Task ID whose global count is checked.

fields.name: m_bShowByPeriod
fields.description: Show task only during the required period.

fields.name: m_bShowByFaction
fields.description: Show task only to members of the required faction.

fields.name: m_bShowByGender
fields.description: Show task only to the required gender.

fields.name: m_bShowByOccup
fields.description: Show task only to the required occupation.

fields.name: m_bShowBySpouse
fields.description: Show task only to married players.

fields.name: m_ulMutexTaskCount
fields.description: Count of mutually exclusive task IDs.

fields.name: m_bRcvByTeam
fields.description: Team leader receives on behalf of all.

fields.name: m_bSharedTask
fields.description: Task progress is shared among team members.

fields.name: m_fTeammateDist
fields.description: Effective team member range (flat XZ distance).

fields.name: m_bAllFail
fields.description: Any member failing causes the whole team to fail.

fields.name: m_bCntByMemPos
fields.description: Only count kills within member proximity.

fields.name: m_TeamMemsWanted
fields.description: Runtime pointer; variable section has m_ulTeamMemsWanted × TEAM_MEM_WANTED(37 bytes).

fields.name: m_bShowByTeam
fields.description: Show task only to teams meeting requirements.

fields.name: m_MPTask
fields.description: Master-prentice task pairs, 8 bytes each. struct MASTER_PRENTICE_TASK { uint32 m_ulLevLimit; uint32 m_ulTaskID; }.

fields.name: m_nFamilySkillIndex
fields.description: Which family skill slot to check.

fields.name: m_bPremNeedComp
fields.description: Whether prerequisite comparison expressions are active. If true, 4 variable strings follow in the variable section.

fields.name: m_PremCompExp1
fields.description: First prerequisite comparison expression. See compare_expression.json.

fields.name: m_bScriptOpenTask
fields.description: Task is opened by server script.

fields.name: m_ulPremCircleGroupMin
fields.description: Min Circle of Doom group points.

fields.name: m_ulPremCircleGroupMax
fields.description: Max Circle of Doom group points.

fields.name: m_bExpMustFull
fields.description: Player EXP bar must be full.

fields.name: m_bShowByFengshenLvl
fields.description: Show task only at required ascension level.

fields.name: m_bShowByFactionGoldNote
fields.description: Show task only with required faction gold note.

fields.name: m_bShowByInterObjId
fields.description: Show task only near required interactive object.

fields.name: m_bPremHasKing
fields.description: Server must currently have a king.

fields.name: m_enumMethod
fields.description: Completion method enum (how the task is fulfilled).

fields.name: m_MonsterWanted
fields.description: Runtime pointer; variable section has m_ulMonsterWanted × MONSTER_WANTED(22 bytes).

fields.name: m_ItemsWanted
fields.description: Runtime pointer; variable section has m_ulItemsWanted × ITEM_WANTED(31 bytes).

fields.name: m_ulInterObjWanted
fields.description: Count of interactive objects to use.

fields.name: m_InterObjWanted
fields.description: Runtime pointer; variable section has m_ulInterObjWanted × INTEROBJ_WANTED(8 bytes).

fields.name: m_InterReachSiteMin
fields.description: Min corner of interactive-object reach zone.

fields.name: m_InterReachSiteMax
fields.description: Max corner of interactive-object reach zone.

fields.name: m_ulInterReachSiteId
fields.description: World ID for interactive object reach zone.

fields.name: m_InterLeaveSiteMin
fields.description: Min corner of interactive-object leave zone.

fields.name: m_InterLeaveSiteMax
fields.description: Max corner of interactive-object leave zone.

fields.name: m_ulInterLeaveSiteId
fields.description: World ID for interactive-object leave zone.

fields.name: m_iInterLeaveItemId
fields.description: Item required to leave interact zone.

fields.name: m_iBuildingIdWanted
fields.description: Building ID the player must construct/own.

fields.name: m_ulNPCDestSite
fields.description: Destination site ID for NPC escort.

fields.name: m_szAutoMoveDestPosName
fields.description: UI display name for auto-navigate destination.

fields.name: m_ulWaitTime
fields.description: Time to wait at reach site (seconds).

fields.name: m_ulTitleWantedNum
fields.description: Count of titles player must hold.

fields.name: m_ulFinishAchievement
fields.description: Achievement ID unlocked on task finish.

fields.name: m_bScriptFinishTask
fields.description: Task is finished by server script.

fields.name: m_bFinNeedComp
fields.description: KEY FIELD: Whether finish comparison expressions are active. If true, 4 strings follow in the variable section (sizes at offsets 2294, 2330, 2362, 2398).

fields.name: m_FinCompExp1
fields.description: First finish comparison expression. strExpLeft._cur_size at offset 2294, strExpRight._cur_size at 2330.

fields.name: m_FinCompExp2
fields.description: Second finish comparison expression. strExpLeft._cur_size at offset 2362, strExpRight._cur_size at 2398.

fields.name: m_ulActionNPC
fields.description: NPC to trigger an action animation on.

fields.name: m_ulAwardType_S
fields.description: Success award type: 1=normal AWARD_DATA, 2=ratio scale, 3=items scale, 4=count scale.

fields.name: m_ulAwardType_F
fields.description: Failure award type (same enum as m_ulAwardType_S).

fields.name: m_Award_S
fields.description: Runtime pointer; indicates AWARD_DATA follows in variable section for success.

fields.name: m_Award_F
fields.description: Runtime pointer; indicates AWARD_DATA follows for failure.

fields.name: m_AwByRatio_S
fields.description: Runtime pointer; indicates AWARD_RATIO_SCALE follows for success.

fields.name: m_AwByRatio_F
fields.description: Runtime pointer; indicates AWARD_RATIO_SCALE follows for failure.

fields.name: m_AwByItems_S
fields.description: Runtime pointer; indicates AWARD_ITEMS_SCALE follows for success.

fields.name: m_AwByItems_F
fields.description: Runtime pointer; indicates AWARD_ITEMS_SCALE follows for failure.

fields.name: m_AwByCount_S
fields.description: Runtime pointer; indicates AWARD_COUNT_SCALE follows for success.

fields.name: m_AwByCount_F
fields.description: Runtime pointer; indicates AWARD_COUNT_SCALE follows for failure.

fields.name: m_ulPrevSibling
fields.description: Previous sibling task ID in the task tree.
